name: sunny
description: Project Sunny — AI therapeutic learning companion

scripts.test:tts: npx tsx src/tests/test-tts-sanitize.ts && npx tsx src/tests/test-tts-flush.ts
scripts.sunny: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.sunny:testmode:spelling: cd web && npm run build && cd .. && TTS_ENABLED=false npx tsx src/scripts/launch-kiosk.ts
scripts.dev:test: concurrently --names "server,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "SUNNY_TEST_MODE=true npx tsx src/server.ts" "cd web && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:canvas: concurrently --names "canvas,web" --prefix-colors "yellow,magenta" "PORT=3001 npx tsx src/scripts/test-canvas.ts" "cd web && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:live: concurrently --names "server,web" --prefix-colors "green,magenta" "npx tsx src/server.ts" "cd web && npm run dev"
